_comment: Official Amplitude MCP server (hosted, OAuth). READ+WRITE server with NO read-only flag — read-only is enforced ONLY by the connected user's role (use a dedicated Viewer account; see SETUP.md). The autonomous runner skips permission prompts, so the account role is the only guardrail. US endpoint shown; EU: https://mcp.eu.amplitude.com/mcp. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
